_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: NF1-45 cells were also more sensitive to each metabolic inhibitor tested
details: NF1-45 cells were more sensitive to all metabolic inhibitors tested (2DG, BPTES, Etomoxir, DGAT1i, DGAT2i)
